text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, the curtains on the Arima Kinen rise. This
will be the finale of Fuji Kiseki's four-part
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd sends her off in a sea of unending
cheers. She tells me how thankful she is that I've
been there for her all this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes off to run in the race. She's more
dazzling than she's ever been and is the most
brilliant star in the world.
